title: Programming Basics
summary: 9618 AS programming — variables, assignment, input/output, and expressions in pseudocode.
learningObjectives: Use assignment and arithmetic operators correctly.
Apply MOD, DIV, and integer division rules.

simpleExplanation.title: First programs
simpleExplanation.summary: Programs store data in variables, compute expressions, and communicate via input and output. Assignment replaces the old value.
steps: Trace top to bottom — update trace table each line.

sections.content: **Programming basics** (11.1) with **constructs** (11.2) form Paper 2 core. Practise **dry runs** without a computer — exam conditions.
